parameters.jsCode: return items.map(i => ({ json: { ...i.json, balanced_at: new Date().toISOString() } }));

parameters.text:
=### WORLDMODELS FORCE EXTRACTION v21.12 ###
TEXT: "{{ $json.texto_limpio }}"

CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:
1. 4 LANGUAGES MANDATORY: You MUST provide 'title' and 'text' in ES, EN, RU, and PT. If the original text is only in one language, TRANSLATE IT TO THE OTHER THREE.
2. FULL ANNOUNCEMENT: DO NOT summarize. The 'text_xx' fields must contain the ENTIRE announcement translated.
3. CONTACT: Extract any phone, @username, or URL. If NOT found, set as null.
4. CATEGORY: Strictly classify as: plaza | evento | escorts.

JSON SCHEMA:
{
  "city": "City Name",
  "budget": "Price or 'Negociable'",
  "category": "plaza/evento/escorts",
  "title_es": "Título corto", "text_es": "ANUNCIO COMPLETO ES", 
  "title_en": "Short Title", "text_en": "FULL ANNOUNCEMENT EN",
  "title_ru": "Краткое название", "text_ru": "ПОЛНОЕ ОБЪЯВЛЕНИЕ RU",
  "title_pt": "Título corto", "text_pt": "ANÚNCIO COMPLETO PT",
  "contact": "Contact Info or null", "trash": false
}

parameters.jsCode: return items.map(i => ({ json: { ...i.json, balanced_at: new Date().toISOString() } }));
